title: Nameless Men
writer: Harry Braxton, E. Morton Hough, Jack Natteford
actors: Claire Windsor, Antonio Moreno, Eddie Gribbon
plot: Bob Strong, a detective, goes to prison undercover to befriend Hugh, a young man who was part of a gang that committed a robbery, in order to find out where they hid the money. Strong finally finds out the name of Hugh's partner, ...
